title: centaurea × livonica
intro: Centaurea × livonica, also known as Livonian knapweed, is a hybrid plant species within the genus Centaurea, specifically derived from the cross between Centaurea scabiosa and Centaurea diluta. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. The health benefits of Centaurea × livonica include its ability to act as a natural remedy for skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to help lower blood pressure and reduce anxiety. Herbal preparations of Centaurea × livonica include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
